title: BackupInfo
description: Schema for backupinfo.json — the file/folder tree with backup status and hash metadata.

filefoldertree_status.description: 'ready' once the tree has been built; 'error' while construction is in progress or failed.

filefoldertree.description: Root of the recursive file/folder tree. Tree structure is frozen after creation; only file node attributes isbackuped, hashtype, hashvalue are mutable one-way.

FileFolderNode.description: A node in the file/folder tree. Must be either a folder or a file.

isbackuped.description: Whether this file has been backed up. May transition false→true once.

hashtype.description: Hash algorithm identifier (e.g. 'sha256'). May transition 'invalid'→<algorithm> once.

hashvalue.description: Hex digest of the file. May transition '0'→<hex> once.
